docs/testing.md:19:That path exercises real smart HTTP fetch and push with a local bare source repo and a local bare target repo.
docs/testing.md:33:That test uses a real `git-http-backend` source/target pair and checks that a smaller `--target-max-pack-bytes` planning limit produces at least as many planned checkpoints as a larger one, while still planning to the branch tip.
docs/testing.md:49:These are useful for large-source relay and memory checks while keeping the target local and disposable.

1	// Package syncer provides the top-level orchestration for git-sync.
2	// It delegates to internal/gitproto for protocol, internal/planner for
3	// planning, and internal/auth for credentials.
4	package syncer
5	
6	import (
7		"context"
8		"encoding/json"
9		"errors"
10		"fmt"
11		"log/slog"
12		"net/http"
13		"os"
14		"sort"
15		"strings"
16	
17		git "github.com/go-git/go-git/v6"
18		"github.com/go-git/go-git/v6/plumbing"
19		"github.com/go-git/go-git/v6/plumbing/protocol/packp"
20		"github.com/go-git/go-git/v6/plumbing/storer"
21		"github.com/go-git/go-git/v6/plumbing/transport"
22		"github.com/go-git/go-git/v6/storage/memory"
23	
24		"entire.io/entire/gitsync/internal/auth"
25		"entire.io/entire/gitsync/internal/convert"
26		"entire.io/entire/gitsync/internal/gitproto"
27		"entire.io/entire/gitsync/internal/planner"
28		bstrap "entire.io/entire/gitsync/internal/strategy/bootstrap"
29		"entire.io/entire/gitsync/internal/strategy/incremental"
30		"entire.io/entire/gitsync/internal/strategy/materialized"
31		repstrat "entire.io/entire/gitsync/internal/strategy/replicate"
32		"entire.io/entire/gitsync/internal/validation"
33	)
34	
35	const (
36		protocolModeAuto = validation.ProtocolAuto
37		protocolModeV1   = validation.ProtocolV1
38		protocolModeV2   = validation.ProtocolV2
39		modeSync         = "sync"
40		modeReplicate    = "replicate"
41	)
42	
43	const DefaultMaterializedMaxObjects = materialized.DefaultMaxMaterializedObjects
44	
45	// Endpoint holds the connection configuration for a remote.
46	type Endpoint struct {
47		URL           string
48		Username      string
49		Token         string
50		BearerToken   string
51		SkipTLSVerify bool
52	
53		// FollowInfoRefsRedirect, when true, rewrites the effective host of
54		// this endpoint to the final URL of /info/refs after HTTP redirects,
55		// so follow-up upload-pack / receive-pack POSTs land on the
56		// redirected node. Plumbed into gitproto.Conn.FollowInfoRefsRedirect.
57		FollowInfoRefsRedirect bool
58	}
59	
60	// RefMapping is a user-specified source:target ref mapping.
61	type RefMapping = validation.RefMapping
62	
63	// Config holds all configuration for a sync operation.
64	type Config struct {
65		Source                 Endpoint
66		Target                 Endpoint
67		HTTPClient             *http.Client
68		Branches               []string
69		Mappings               []RefMapping
70		IncludeTags            bool
71		DryRun                 bool
72		Verbose                bool
73		ShowStats              bool
74		MeasureMemory          bool
75		Mode                   string
76		Force                  bool
77		Prune                  bool
78		MaxPackBytes           int64
79		TargetMaxPackBytes     int64
80		MaterializedMaxObjects int
81		ProtocolMode           string
82	}
83	
84	// Re-export types from planner for CLI compatibility.
85	type (
86		RefKind    = planner.RefKind
87		Action     = planner.Action
88		BranchPlan = planner.BranchPlan
89	)
90	
91	const (
92		RefKindBranch = planner.RefKindBranch
93		RefKindTag    = planner.RefKindTag
94		ActionCreate  = planner.ActionCreate
95		ActionUpdate  = planner.ActionUpdate
96		ActionDelete  = planner.ActionDelete
97		ActionSkip    = planner.ActionSkip
98		ActionBlock   = planner.ActionBlock
99	)

input.description: Run go vet on whole module

result.output: (Bash completed with no output)

[tools]
# Please also keep the version aligned in the go.mod file
go = { version = '1.26.2', postinstall = "go install github.com/go-delve/delve/cmd/dlv@latest && go install gotest.tools/gotestsum@latest" }
golangci-lint = '2.11.4'
shellcheck = 'latest'

[tasks.fmt]
description = "Run gofmt"
run = "gofmt -s -w ."

[tasks.test]
description = "Run tests"
env = { GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT = "0" }
run = "go test ./..."

[tasks."test:ci"]
description = "Run all tests with race detection"
env = { GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT = "0" }
run = "go test -race ./..."

[tasks."test:git-http-backend"]
description = "Run optional git-http-backend integration tests"
run = "GITSYNC_E2E_GIT_HTTP_BACKEND=1 go test ./internal/syncer -run 'TestRun_GitHTTPBackendSync|TestBootstrap_GitHTTPBackendSync' -v"

[tasks."test:linux-smoke"]
description = "Run optional live linux bootstrap smoke test"
run = "GITSYNC_E2E_LIVE_LINUX=1 go test ./internal/syncer -run TestBootstrap_LiveLinuxSource -timeout 60m -v"

[tasks."test:linux-smoke:batched"]
description = "Run optional live linux batched bootstrap smoke test"
run = "GITSYNC_E2E_LIVE_LINUX=1 go test ./internal/syncer -run TestBootstrap_LiveLinuxSourceBatched -timeout 60m -v"

[tasks."test:entire-local-smoke"]
description = "Run optional smoke syncing a public repo into a running Entire local instance"
run = "GITSYNC_E2E_ENTIRE=1 go test ./internal/syncer -run TestRun_EntireLocalPublicRepoSmoke -timeout 30m -v"

[tasks."test:entire-local-smoke:linux"]
description = "Run optional batched smoke syncing the Linux repo into a running Entire local instance"
run = "GITSYNC_E2E_ENTIRE=1 GITSYNC_E2E_ENTIRE_SOURCE_URL=https://github.com/torvalds/linux.git GITSYNC_E2E_ENTIRE_BRANCH=master GITSYNC_E2E_ENTIRE_PROTOCOL=v2 GITSYNC_E2E_ENTIRE_BATCH_MAX_PACK_BYTES=536870912 go test ./internal/syncer -run TestRun_EntireLocalPublicRepoSmoke -timeout 60m -v"

#!/bin/sh
#MISE description="Lint"
#MISE depends=["lint:go", "lint:gofmt", "lint:gomod", "lint:shellcheck"]
#!/bin/sh
#MISE description="Lint go"

golangci-lint version
golangci-lint config verify

# In CI, we rely on golangci/golangci-lint-action@v9 defined in .github/workflows/lint.yml
# so only run this locally:
if [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then
  echo "skipped because CI=true"
else
  golangci-lint run --timeout=30m --fix ./...
fi
#!/bin/sh
#MISE description="Lint gofmt"

# List of non-formatted files:
files="$(gofmt -l -s .)"

# Is that list empty?  If not exit nonzero and say which files are unformatted:
if [ -n "$files" ]; then
  echo "These .go files need to be formatted:"
  echo ""
  echo "$files"
  echo ""
  echo "To fix: mise run fmt"
  exit 1
fi
#!/bin/sh
#MISE description="go mod tidy"

go mod tidy

# Check and fail if there are differences with committed files:
status="$(git status --porcelain=v1 go.mod go.sum 2>/dev/null)"
if [ "$status" != "" ]; then
  echo "go module files modified, please commit result of 'go mod tidy'!"
  echo "$status"
  exit 1
fi
#!/bin/bash
#MISE description="Check dependency licenses"
set -e

# Colors for output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

echo "Checking dependency licenses..."

# Install go-licenses if not available
if ! command -v go-licenses &> /dev/null; then
    echo "Installing go-licenses tool..."
    go install github.com/google/go-licenses@latest
    GOPATH=$(go env GOPATH)
    export PATH="$GOPATH/bin:$PATH"
fi

# Load allowed licenses
ALLOWED_LICENSES_FILE=".allowed-licenses"
if [ ! -f "$ALLOWED_LICENSES_FILE" ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}ERROR: .allowed-licenses file not found${NC}"
    exit 1
fi

# Read allowed licenses into array (skip comments and empty lines)
ALLOWED_LICENSES=()
while IFS= read -r line; do
    # Skip comments and empty lines
    if [[ ! "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] && [[ -n "$line" ]]; then
        ALLOWED_LICENSES+=("$line")
    fi
done < "$ALLOWED_LICENSES_FILE"

echo "Allowed licenses: ${ALLOWED_LICENSES[*]}"
echo ""

# Get licenses from dependencies
TEMP_FILE=$(mktemp)
# shellcheck disable=SC2312
go-licenses csv ./cmd/git-sync 2>/dev/null | sort | uniq > "$TEMP_FILE"

# Check each dependency
VIOLATIONS=()
while IFS=',' read -r package _url license; do
    # Skip internal packages
    if [[ "$package" == entire.io/entire/gitsync/* ]]; then
        continue
    fi

    # Check if license is allowed
    ALLOWED=false
    for allowed in "${ALLOWED_LICENSES[@]}"; do
        if [ "$license" == "$allowed" ]; then
            ALLOWED=true
            break
        fi
    done

    if [ "$ALLOWED" = false ]; then
        VIOLATIONS+=("$package,$license")
    fi
done < "$TEMP_FILE"

# Report results
if [ ${#VIOLATIONS[@]} -eq 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ All dependency licenses are allowed${NC}"
    rm "$TEMP_FILE"
    exit 0
else
    echo -e "${RED}✗ Found ${#VIOLATIONS[@]} dependency(ies) with non-allowed licenses:${NC}"
    echo ""
    for violation in "${VIOLATIONS[@]}"; do
        IFS=',' read -r pkg lic <<< "$violation"
        echo -e "${YELLOW}  - $pkg${NC}"
        echo -e "    License: ${RED}$lic${NC}"
    done
    echo ""
    echo "If these licenses are acceptable, add them to .allowed-licenses"
    rm "$TEMP_FILE"
    exit 1
fi
#!/bin/sh
#MISE description="Lint shell scripts with shellcheck"

find mise-tasks -type f -exec sh -c 'head -1 "$1" | grep -q "^#!/bin/sh\|^#!/bin/bash"' _ {} \; -print0 | xargs -0 shellcheck

content.text:
All passing. Summary of changes:

- **`internal/validation/validation.go`** — added `ValidateEndpoints(sourceURL, targetURL)` that rejects identical (whitespace-trimmed) URLs and ignores empties so the existing "missing URL" errors stay specific.
- **`internal/syncer/syncer.go`** — `newSession` now calls `ValidateEndpoints` when a target is required, before any network I/O.
- **`internal/validation/validation_test.go`** — `TestValidateEndpoints` covers same/different/whitespace/empty/trailing-slash cases.
- **`internal/syncer/syncer_test.go`** — `TestPublicAPIRejectsIdenticalSourceAndTarget` proves `Run`, `Bootstrap`, and `Probe`-with-target all reject same URLs; `TestProbeWithoutTargetIgnoresEndpointEqualityCheck` guards against false positives when probe has no target.

Pre-existing `TestRun_IntegrationReplicate*` failures (gpg-signing in test setup) reproduce on `main` and are unrelated.
